summary: iter91 Company Closing PDF — both backend and frontend fully verified end-to-end. Backend endpoint GET /api/admin/company-funds/closing.pdf returns 200 with a 738KB signed PDF for admins, 403 for VIP/normal, 401 unauthenticated and 400 on bad dates. Full-history mode (empty range) produces the 'Reporte histórico completo' title while explicit ranges yield 'Reporte del <since> al <until>'. Frontend button, dialog, quick-range chips (7d/month/year/clear) and download flow all work; the CSV export dialog (iter88) still functions with no regression from the new closingOpen state.
critical_code_review_comments: The `closing-pdf-quick-clear` chip is only rendered by QuickDateRange when at least one date is set (!isEmpty). This matches the CSV export dialog pattern and is expected UX — tests that look for it in the initial empty state will miss it; check it only after selecting a preset.

PDF file naming uses only the date range without hour/minute in the Content-Disposition (backend adds a UTC timestamp `_YYYYMMDD_HHMM`, but the frontend axios blob path derives its own name 'cierre_empresa_historico.pdf' — server filename is not preserved). Non-blocking; both are readable.

The route relies on `require_permission(request, 'company_funds')` which also gates the CSV export; verified employees without that permission get a Spanish 403 message. VIP/Normal roles bypass check at role level (403). Consistent with iter88.
test_credentials: session_token cookie test_session_admin_X (admin), test_session_vip_X (VIP), test_session_normal_X (normal) — from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Cookie name confirmed as `session_token` and works against /api/auth/me.
seed_data_creation: None. Used the already-seeded test users from conftest.
context_for_next_testing_agent: For admin-only frontend routes, set a Playwright cookie {name:'session_token', value:'test_session_admin_X', domain:'p2p-exchange-hub-2.preview.emergentagent.com', path:'/', secure:true, sameSite:'None'} BEFORE page.goto. This works reliably in this environment for AuthContext to hydrate. Backend Bearer testing uses the same token via `Authorization: Bearer test_session_admin_X`.
verified_flows: GET /api/admin/company-funds/closing.pdf (admin) → 200, application/pdf, 738928 bytes, all sections + KPIs + signature block present
Empty range → 'Reporte histórico completo' in body; explicit range → 'Reporte del 2026-01-01 al 2026-07-19'
UI: company-closing-pdf-btn renders with purple accent (border-#8B5CF6/60 text-#A78BFA) and label 'Company Closing PDF' / 'Cierre Empresa PDF'
UI: company-closing-dialog opens with since/until inputs, quick-range chips row, download button
UI: closing-pdf-quick-year fills 2026-01-01..today; closing-pdf-quick-month fills 2026-07-01..today; closing-pdf-quick-clear empties both
UI: closing-pdf-download triggers browser download of 738KB PDF (empty range) with embedded signature+stamp images
Regression: cw-export-csv-btn still opens cw-export-dialog with cw-export-download button (iter88 not broken by iter91's new closingOpen state)
